title: lastrea crystallina
intro: Lastrea crystallina, also known as the crystal fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. It is believed to have health benefits such as lowering blood pressure and acting as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage. Lastrea crystallina can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to be used for medicinal purposes.
